calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Anne-Leith Matlock, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MATLOCK LAW GROUP, P.C.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WILLIE BROWN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
K. Brian Matlock sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,407.25
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of : $14,434.26
Attorney's Fees: $1,800.00
Costs: $544.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $44,185.51
Judgment signed in open court.
